description.value: Price 25,000 gp; Weight 5 lbs.; Slot none; CL 9th; Aura moderate conjuration DESCRIPTION This twisted wooden rod resembles the horn of a unicorn. Three times per day, the user can touch the rod to a target as a standard action and heal it with cure light wounds. Once per day, the user can heal a creature in this way with cure moderate wounds. Once per day, the user can also cast neutralize poison on a target in this way. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 12,500 gp; Feats Craft Rod; Spells cure light wounds, cure moderate wounds, neutralize poison; Special creator must be good-aligned
